pricing_plans.name: Pro Plan
features: Priority email & live chat support (12-hour response)

policies.refund: 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. Contact support@servicehub.com within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.
policies.free_trial: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
policies.cancellation: Cancel anytime from your dashboard. Access continues until end of billing period.
policies.support: Basic: email, 72-hour response. Pro: priority email + live chat, 12-hour response. Enterprise: 24/7 with dedicated account manager.
policies.data_security: AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. SOC 2 Type II compliant.
policies.upgrades: Upgrade anytime (immediate, prorated). Downgrade takes effect next billing cycle.
